electrification.label: Electrification
electrification.description: Tag when electricity input rises relative to the incumbent and fossil fuel inputs fall.

efficiency_improvement.label: Efficiency improvement
efficiency_improvement.description: Tag when total energy input per unit of output falls against the reference state.

fossil_to_gas_switch.label: Fossil-to-gas switch
fossil_to_gas_switch.description: Tag when natural gas input rises while coal or refined liquids fall.

fossil_to_biomass_switch.label: Fossil-to-biomass switch
fossil_to_biomass_switch.description: Tag when biomass input rises while fossil fuel inputs fall.

fossil_to_hydrogen_switch.label: Fossil-to-hydrogen switch
fossil_to_hydrogen_switch.description: Tag when hydrogen input rises while fossil fuel inputs fall.

ccs_or_sequestration.label: CCS / sequestration
ccs_or_sequestration.description: Tag when capture-service demand appears or process and direct emissions fall without a full output substitution.

clinker_reduction_or_material_substituti.label: Clinker reduction / material substitution
clinker_reduction_or_material_substituti.description: Tag cement states that cut process emissions through lower-clinker or substitute-material pathways.

scrap_eaf_shift.label: Scrap-EAF shift
scrap_eaf_shift.description: Tag steel states that rely more on electricity and scrap steel and less on coal and iron ore.

removals.label: Removals
removals.description: Tag states whose primary output is a removals service rather than a demanded end-use service.

incumbent_lock_in.label: Incumbent lock-in
incumbent_lock_in.description: Tag incumbent or fossil-heavy pathways that remain selected despite lower-emissions alternatives.

rollout_cap_binding.label: Rollout cap binding
rollout_cap_binding.description: Tag when a configuration explanation should point to max-share, max-activity, or rollout notes as active limits.

exploratory_dependence.label: Exploratory dependence
exploratory_dependence.description: Tag states that rely on low-confidence or exploratory evidence ratings.
